living-concrete.knowledge: Phase 1: Understand request, assess user knowledge, clarify until contextualized Determine depth: quick | standard | deep
Phase 2: Scratchpad at /tmp/research_draft.md Multiple search queries, evaluate sources, extract patterns, synthesize, cite
Phase 3: YAML frontmatter + structured sections + citations Save to research/ with descriptive title
Phase 4: Present, gather feedback, refine in place
title, date (ISO), author, tags (Obsidian), depth, status, sources count
1. TOC 2. Executive Summary 3. Background 4. Main Content 5. Implications 6. References 7. Footnotes
Technical: code examples, impl details | Conceptual: analogies, mental models Strategic: frameworks, decision matrices
What aspects interest you? Current understanding? What decisions will this inform? Depth?
living-concrete.pattern: Not magazine, not academic - engaging technical writing. Clarity with depth.
Progressive disclosure, visual breaks (diagrams/tables/code), concrete examples, clear transitions
Completeness (gaps addressed?) | Accuracy (sources credible?) | Readability (key points clear?) Actionability (can apply?) | Discoverability (graph reveals connections?)
